name: teamwork-skill
description: Coordinate coding-agent teamwork across evidence gathering, scoped execution, review, and verified completion.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate subagents from evidence to reviewed completion.
interface.longDescription: A compact router plus dedicated stage skills for coding-agent collaboration and autonomous goal convergence. The main agent decomposes and accepts work while subagents investigate, implement scoped plans, review independently, and return condensed evidence.
defaultPrompt: Split a coding task into evidence-gathering, planning, execution, and review tracks.
Use subagents for independent investigation or fresh-context review.
Execute an accepted plan with minimal edits and focused verification.
Review plans or execution results with direct evidence before claiming completion.
